description: Azure OpenAI Responses streaming with image_generation tool. Validates canonical v3 tool-call/tool-result parts for large base64 payloads.

source.notes: Golden normalization redacts large base64 strings to keep repo size manageable.

notes: Large base64 fields are redacted in JSONL goldens as {"$redacted":"base64","len":...,"hash":"fnv1a64:..."}.
